creator: jacob@whotookspaz.org
text:
*blush* Sorry it took so long.

I cannot duplicate your build error here I'm afraid. However I did get a 
new build error:

---
==>  Building for conspire-1.0.0
--- snip 8< ---
Successfully compiled urlgrab.c.
Successfully compiled userlistgui.c.
Successfully compiled xtext.c.
../common/libconspire.a(signal_printer.o)(.text+0x18a5): In function 
`signal_printer_plugin_unloaded':
/usr/ports/irc/conspire/work/conspire-1.0.0/src/common/signal_printer.c:930: 
undefined reference to `fe_pluginlist_update'
../common/libconspire.a(signal_printer.o)(.text+0x18e6): In function 
`signal_printer_plugin_loaded':
/usr/ports/irc/conspire/work/conspire-1.0.0/src/common/signal_printer.c:920: 
undefined reference to `fe_pluginlist_update'
Failed to link conspire!
gmake[5]: *** [conspire] Error 1
gmake[4]: *** [all] Error 1
gmake[3]: *** [subdirs] Error 1
gmake[2]: *** [all] Error 1
gmake[1]: *** [subdirs] Error 1
gmake: *** [all] Error 1
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/irc/conspire.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/irc/conspire.

---

This seems to be related to the plugin knob. Try enabling it and see if 
that helps any. Also make sure your GTK+ installation is up to date. If 
this helps/makes it worse, let me know.
